hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. is a global technology company headquartered in Sarajevo, providing cutting-edge software solutions to enterprises across three continents.

mission.title: Borongwa
mission.description: We help organizations turn ambitious ideas into reliable digital products that create measurable business value.
points: Align technology delivery with clear business results.
Build long-term systems that remain maintainable as teams scale.
Dirisana gaufi le batsayakarolo go tloga ka leano go fitlha ka tiragatso.

expertise.title: Boitseanape
expertise.description: Our multidisciplinary teams combine engineering depth with product thinking across modern technology stacks.
points: Cloud architecture, DevOps automation, and resilient infrastructure.
Applied AI/ML, data workflows, and IoT-enabled products.

approach.title: Approach
approach.description: We execute with a transparent, iterative model that keeps delivery predictable while reducing product risk.
points: Discover: define scope, priorities, and success metrics early.
Build: ship in focused increments with continuous feedback loops.
Optimize: Monitor results and improve performance over time.

cta.title: A o ipaakanyeditse go fetola kgwebo ya gago?
cta.description: Join the growing list of companies that trust Horizon Tech to deliver innovative solutions and exceptional results.

hero.title: Ikgolaganye le rona
hero.description: A o na le porojeke mo mogopolong? Re lebeletse go utlwa go tswa go lona. Tlotla ka kafa re ka go thusang ka gone gore o nne le seabe mo botshelong jwa gago.

hero.description: A diverse team of technologists, designers, and strategists building high-impact digital products together.

hamza.bio: Visionary leader and technical architect with 10+ years in enterprise software, specializing in AI/ML, cloud platforms, and scalable product architecture.

ahmet.bio: Cybersecurity specialist focused on enterprise security architecture, secure on-prem infrastructure, and compliance-first delivery for regulated environments.

culture.title: Botshelo kwa Horizon Tech
culture.description: Re rotloetsa setso sa boitlhamelo, tirisanommogo le go ithuta ka tsela e e tswelelang

remoteFirst.title: Setso sa Ntlha se se Kgakala
remoteFirst.description: Bereka go tswa gongwe le gongwe ka diura tse di fetofetogang le go tsepamisa mogopolo mo diphitlhelelong, e seng mo lefelo.

collaborative.title: Tikologo ya Tirisanommogo
collaborative.description: Regular team events, knowledge sharing sessions, and cross-functional collaboration.

workLife.title: Tekatekano-Botshelo jwa Tiro
workLife.description: Boikhutso jo bo siameng, tshegetso ya boitekanelo jwa tlhaloganyo le go tlotla nako ya motho ka nosi.

innovation.title: Innovation Time
innovation.description: 20% nako ya diporojeke tsa botho, di-hackathon le dithekenoloji tse dintšhwa.

cta.title: A o batla go tsenela setlhopha sa rona?
cta.description: Ka metlha re batla batho ba ba nang le talente ba ba amegang ka tiro ya bokgoni, go nna mong le boitlhamelo.

hero.description: Join a team of engineers building cutting-edge software for global clients. Dira tiro e e kgakala, gola ka go tswelela mme o nne le seabe se se siameng.

process.title: Our Hiring Process
process.description: Tlotla nako ya gago ka tsela e e siameng, e e siameng le e e siameng

steps.title: Apply
steps.description: Romela kopo ya gago mme re tla e sekaseka mo malatsing a le 3 a kgwebo.

steps.title: Puisano ya Ntlha
steps.description: Tsaya metsotso e le 30 go tlotla ka maitemogelo a gago le maitemogelo a gago.

steps.title: Setegeniki
steps.description: Technical interview or practical exercise to showcase your skills.

steps.title: Offer
steps.description: Kopana le setlhopha mme o amogele mpho ya gago ya go tsenela Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Bona gore re thusitse jang dikhampani go ralala madirelo go fetola ditiro ka thekenoloji e e mosola, e e nang le tlhotlheletso e e kwa godimo.

faqs.question: What services does Horizon Tech offer?
faqs.answer: We provide custom software development, AI/ML solutions, cloud architecture, DevOps, business intelligence, and IoT services.

faqs.question: Ke simolola jang porojeke ka Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Ikopanye le rona ka foromo kapa ka imeile ho fana ka ditlhoko tsa hao. We will schedule a discovery call and share a proposal.

faqs.question: ● A o tlamela ka tshegetso le tshegetso e e tswelelang?
faqs.answer: Ee. We offer support and maintenance packages that include bug fixes, security updates, and feature improvements.
